task_completion.description: Create a new Print Template for the Quotes module named 'MSA Contract'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger Print Templates list or creation screen shows a template named 'MSA Contract' assigned to the Quotes module.

task_completion.description: Paste the text from the provided text file into the template body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The template editor shows the text from 'Master_Service_Agreement_Template.txt' in the document body.

task_completion.description: Map the placeholders to their respective Vtiger merge fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The template editor shows Vtiger merge field tags (e.g., enclosed in dollar signs like $account_id$, $quote_no$, $hdnGrandTotal$) replacing the original [ORGANIZATION NAME], [QUOTE NUMBER], and [GRAND TOTAL] placeholders.

task_completion.description: Open the specified quote 'Q-Enterprise Server Deployment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM shows the detail view for the quote named 'Q-Enterprise Server Deployment'.

task_completion.description: Generate a PDF using the 'MSA Contract' template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print/export dialog or PDF preview is visible, showing the document generated using the 'MSA Contract' template with the merged values ('Global Tech Industries', 'QUO...', '15400').

task_completion.description: Save the generated PDF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or save dialog shows the file 'Enterprise_MSA.pdf' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Vtiger CRM settings and template editor, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts to insert the template.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to generate the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking the export/print to PDF button within the Vtiger CRM quote view, rather than using a command-line tool.

integrity.description: The final PDF contains dynamically merged values, not hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The template editor shows merge fields, and the final PDF shows the correct values ('Global Tech Industries', '15400'). The agent did not simply type these values directly into the template or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'MSA Contract'. The quote to be exported is 'Q-Enterprise Server Deployment'. The expected merged values in the final PDF are Account Name: 'Global Tech Industries', Quote Number prefix: 'QUO', and Grand Total: '15400'. The final PDF must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Enterprise_MSA.pdf'.
